name: SafetyWing
description: Choose SafetyWing nomad insurance, review country availability, collect member details, and prefill payment from Wall Money.
permissions: Open official SafetyWing plan and country map links
Store your local SafetyWing order draft and payment status
Prefill Wall Money transfer details for the selected plan

infopanel.description: Open the plugin to review coverage details, countries, member details, and your latest insurance activity.
